vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-swarm
vBRIEFInfo.description: Pre-cutover migration discoverability per #506 D6: standard deft/Taskfile.yml include + actionable fallback message + AGENTS.md branch + docs entry.

plan.title: Pre-cutover migration discoverability from project root and AGENTS.md (#500)

narratives.Overview: Per #506 D6: (primary) publish migration via standard deft/Taskfile.yml include so 'task migrate:vbrief' works from project root when consumer Taskfile includes deft; (fallback) pre-cutover guard actionable message includes 'task -t ./deft/Taskfile.yml migrate:vbrief' when task isn't resolvable; SKIP option (ii) install-step Taskfile mutation.
narratives.Problem: Pre-cutover guard tells operator to run 'task migrate:vbrief' but the task is defined only in deft/Taskfile.yml and fails from project root. AGENTS.md has no pre-cutover branch. Setup flow doesn't preflight environment. No high-level migration doc.
narratives.Action: (A) Document the include: pattern (consumer Taskfile should include deft: deft/Taskfile.yml) in deft/main.md and deft/QUICK-START.md. (B) Update skills/deft-directive-setup/SKILL.md pre-cutover guard: check task resolvability; if unresolvable emit 'task -t ./deft/Taskfile.yml migrate:vbrief' fallback. (C) Add pre-cutover detection branch to AGENTS.md routing (before Phase 1/2/Returning). (D) Add 'Migrating from pre-v0.20' section to deft/main.md cross-referenced from AGENTS.md and deft/QUICK-START.md. Preflight: task resolvable, uv present, migrate_vbrief.py present.
narratives.Test: tests/content/ tests assert: AGENTS.md has pre-cutover branch before Phase 1/2/Returning; deft/main.md has 'Migrating from pre-v0.20' section reachable from AGENTS.md + deft/QUICK-START.md; pre-cutover guard preflight steps documented in setup SKILL.md; fallback command string present; documentation does NOT propose install-step Taskfile mutation (option ii skipped).
narratives.Outcome: Agents literally following AGENTS.md on a pre-cutover project are directed to migration before Phase 1/2 interviews. Operators get a working command whether or not their root Taskfile includes deft.

items.title: Follow directive guidelines: AGENTS.md, deft/main.md, deft/QUICK-START.md, conventional commits, task check before commit
Document deft/Taskfile.yml include pattern in deft/main.md and deft/QUICK-START.md
Update pre-cutover guard with resolvability check + fallback command
Preflight: task resolvable + uv installed + migrate_vbrief.py present
Add pre-cutover detection branch to AGENTS.md before Phase 1/2/Returning
Add 'Migrating from pre-v0.20' section to deft/main.md; cross-link
Explicitly do NOT add install-step Taskfile mutation (option ii skipped per D6)
Content tests for AGENTS.md branch, main.md section, guard wording
